posts.author: Tapology
posts.content: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.content:
Predictions: 8 of 13 Winners, 3 Perfect, 555 Points
|
Tied for 219th

Martins vs. Gonçalves
Richard Martins, TKO, R2
Soul Glo has aura

dos Santos vs. Matos
Felipe dos Santos, TKO, R1
FDS is insanely overrated imo and always got glazed too much for the Kape fight, but he was always in fun fights. Atrocious grappling but he’s got that classic chute boxe brawler style and can give anyone a hard fight on the feet. He was mid in the ufc but tbf fighting Kape, Lone’er, and Lima is a pretty nightmarish run of competition. I expect we see him come back for another run if he strings a few wins together, yfc always loves the chute boxe guys

Pires vs. Ribeiro
Vinicius Pires, DEC
Hard to back Pires after that horrendous fight against Belakh. He had some really bad looks against lower level guys as well, so I’m a little unsure what to think of him. I guess he beats this guy but I won’t be shocked if he drops a round or even gets dropped

Prescendo vs. Tukhtamuradov
Juliano Prescendo, DEC
Tukhtamuradov has aura but man that record is padded; looks fraudulent. Prescendo is not impressive but at least he’s fought real people. If he doesn’t get taken down and smashed inside r1 I think he will probably be fresher

Bianchini vs. Sousa
Diego Bianchini, SUB, R1
Bianchini sucks but he’s getting a layup here. His style is fun but he’s too much of a bjj nerd and gasses hard after r1

Basilio vs. Guedes
Bianca Basilio, SUB, R2
Basilio is another credentialed bjj girl the LFA is trying to push. Idk what her ceiling is either, especially since she’s 30 and fighting in a much more skilled division. She should probably cruise here tho

Uriel vs. Silva
Guilherme Uriel, TKO, R1
Uriel is a fat blob yet he was somehow Josh Hokit’s toughest test. Makes sense

Jesus vs. Douglas
Leslie Jesus, TKO, R2
Leslie is one of Prates’s guys that he’s been taking a lot about. I’ve only seen highlights but he’s looked good in the little I’ve seen. He too has a big test but I assume he will smoke this guy

Silva vs. Andrade
Thalyta Silva, SUB, R1
Not sure what to think of Silva but she did an MMA fight a long time ago and has been open about becoming a full time mma fighter and making ufc. She looks physically very strong but it was hard to get a read on her since she fought a bum. This is a huge jump in comp but this girl also seems like a grappler so Silva should be fine. If she wins here and looks dominant I expect Silva to stay active and push to get signed
